ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the compound */,
  "predicted_log_solubility" REAL /* Predicted log solubility in mols per litre */,
  "min_degree" INTEGER /* Minimum degree of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "num_hbond_donors" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen bond donors */,
  "num_rings" INTEGER /* Number of rings in the compound structure */,
  "num_rotatable_bonds" INTEGER /* Number of rotatable bonds */,
  "polar_surface_area" REAL /* Polar surface area of the compound */,
  "measured_log_solubility" REAL /* Measured log solubility in mols per litre */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the compound structure */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* IUPAC name of the compound */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* InChI key of the compound */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* List of synonyms for the compound (e.g., common names, abbreviations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound the prediction corresponds to */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted solubility value */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the prediction (e.g., 0 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measured_solvabilities" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound the measurement corresponds to */,
  "measured_value" REAL /* Measured solubility value */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement (e.g., HPLC, UV-Vis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measured_solvabilities_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property entry */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound the properties belong to */,
  "hbond_acceptors" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen bond acceptors */,
  "logp" REAL /* LogP value */,
  "tpsa" REAL /* Topological polar surface area */,
  "molecular_volume" REAL /* Molecular volume of the compound */,
  "molecular_surface_area" REAL /* Molecular surface area of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_records" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound involved in the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "experimental_conditions" TEXT /* Experimental conditions for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_records_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_results" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being validated */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project they are collaborating on */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., joint research, data sharing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_records" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who authored the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was released */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors for the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " Compound_Sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source entry */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound the source corresponds to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date the source was created or updated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Compound_Commercial" (
  "commercial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commercial entry */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound the commercial information corresponds to */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_url" TEXT /* URL for the supplier */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the compound */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the compound (e.g., in stock, backordered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commercial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Compound_Commercial_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)
